search.query: index=sysmon source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1 | eval parent_process=coalesce(ParentImage, parent_process_name, "unknown_parent") | eval process=coalesce(Image, process_name, "unknown_process") | stats count by parent_process, process | sort - count | head 15

index=sysmon source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1 | eval process_path=coalesce(Image, process_name, "unknown_process") | eval command_line=coalesce(CommandLine, _raw) | eval command_line_lower=lower(command_line) | where like(command_line_lower, "%base64%") OR like(command_line_lower, "%-enc%") OR like(command_line_lower, "%encodedcommand%") OR like(command_line_lower, "%bypass%") OR like(command_line_lower, "%-nop%") OR like(command_line_lower, "%downloadstring%") OR like(command_line_lower, "%iex%") | where NOT like(lower(process_path), "%splunk%") | table _time, EventCode, process_path, command_line | sort - _time
